name: roundz-enterprise
description: Roundz enterprise ride-hailing monorepo with microservices, web admin, mobile apps, shared contracts, and infrastructure.

scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:server && npm run build:admin
scripts.build:shared: npm run build --workspace @roundz/shared && npm run build --workspace @roundz/server-common
scripts.build:server: npm run build --workspace @roundz/gateway && npm run build --workspace @roundz/auth-service && npm run build --workspace @roundz/user-service && npm run build --workspace @roundz/rider-service && npm run build --workspace @roundz/trip-service && npm run build --workspace @roundz/matching-service && npm run build --workspace @roundz/tracking-service && npm run build --workspace @roundz/wallet-service && npm run build --workspace @roundz/payment-service && npm run build --workspace @roundz/notification-service && npm run build --workspace @roundz/analytics-service && npm run build --workspace @roundz/admin-service && npm run build --workspace @roundz/kyc-service
scripts.build:admin: npm run build --workspace @roundz/admin-shared && npm run build --workspace @roundz/admin-design-system && npm run build --workspace @roundz/admin-shell && npm run build --workspace @roundz/admin-user-management && npm run build --workspace @roundz/admin-rider-management && npm run build --workspace @roundz/admin-trip-monitoring && npm run build --workspace @roundz/admin-wallet-management && npm run build --workspace @roundz/admin-analytics-dashboard && npm run build --workspace @roundz/admin-notification-center && npm run build --workspace @roundz/admin-support-system
scripts.dev:infra: docker compose -f Infrastructure/docker-compose.yml up -d postgres redis kafka mqtt localstack
scripts.dev:server: concurrently -n gateway,auth,user,rider,trip,matching,tracking,wallet,payment,notification,analytics,admin,kyc -c blue,green,cyan,magenta,yellow npm:dev:gateway npm:dev:auth npm:dev:user npm:dev:rider npm:dev:trip npm:dev:matching npm:dev:tracking npm:dev:wallet npm:dev:payment npm:dev:notification npm:dev:analytics npm:dev:admin npm:dev:kyc
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @roundz/shared && npm run test --workspace @roundz/server-common
